# Neural Network From Scratch (Softmax Classifier)

Implemented a feedforward neural network for **multi-class classification** using only **NumPy**.

The network is trained using **manual forward propagation, backpropagation and gradient descent** to classify synthetic data into three classes using a **Softmax** output layer.

## Network Architecture

```text
Input Layer (3 Features)
        │
        ▼
Hidden Layer (5 Neurons, ReLU)
        │
        ▼
Output Layer (3 Neurons, Softmax)
```

## Features

* Multi-Class Classification
* Feedforward Neural Network
* ReLU Hidden Layer
* Softmax Output Layer
* Cross-Entropy Loss
* Manual Backpropagation
* Gradient Descent
* Fully Vectorized NumPy Implementation
* Train/Test Split
* Model Evaluation on Unseen Data

## Concepts Practiced

* Forward Propagation
* Backpropagation
* Softmax Activation
* Cross-Entropy Loss
* Multi-Class Classification
* One-Hot Encoding
* Gradient Computation
* Weight & Bias Updates
* Matrix Operations

---
